data.name: ExternalWeatherNoData
data.value: The external weather service did not return data.

data.name: ExternalWeatherUnavailable
data.value: The external weather service is currently unavailable.

data.name: ExternalWeatherTimeout
data.value: The external weather service request timed out.

data.name: ExternalWeatherInvalidResponse
data.value: The external weather service returned an invalid response.
